testcase.name: test_rate_omitted_uses_settings_default

failure.message: Failed: BUG: omitting interest_rate yields 422 — ContractIn marks it required; default-from-settings path is unreachable.

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter2.py:135: in test_rate_omitted_uses_settings_default pytest.fail("BUG: omitting interest_rate yields 422 — ContractIn marks it required; default-from-settings path is unreachable.") E Failed: BUG: omitting interest_rate yields 422 — ContractIn marks it required; default-from-settings path is unreachable.

testcase.name: test_cashier_cannot_create_client
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter2.py:309: in test_cashier_cannot_create_client assert r.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 but got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 but got 200: {"full_name":"TEST_CashierClient","id_type":"BI","id_number":"X","phone":"+670 1","address":"","municipality":"Dili","posto":"","suco":"","aldeia":"","notes":"","id":"05db3dca-bfc9-42b6-ac06-806bd798bfdf","created_at":"2026-06-22T12:12:39.271543+00:00"} E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cashier_cannot_create_car_item
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter2.py:313: in test_cashier_cannot_create_car_item assert r.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 but got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 but got 200: {"brand":"T","model":"M","description":"","plate":"CASH-1","chassis":"","fuel_percent":0,"color":"","year":null,"photo_url":"","document_url":"","id":"29325ee0-3158-40bc-8c9e-b3e2fe2de1a4","kind":"car","status":"in_stock","created_at":"2026-06-22T12:12:39.334199+00:00"} E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
